page: Google Cloud Platform n2d-highmem-80 is a memory-optimized virtual machine powered by an AMD EPYC 7B13 processor using the x86_64 architecture. It features 80 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 40 physical cores with multithreading enabled. The instance is equipped with 640 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 8 GB per vCPU. It does not include local NVMe storage or dedicated GPU hardware.

Benchmark results indicate strong multi-core performance, with stress-ng and Geekbench multi-core scores placing in the top 25%. Cryptographic execution is a key strength, as evidenced by a top-tier ranking in the Passmark CPU encryption test, supported by hardware-accelerated AES and SHA instructions. Cached memory bandwidth is highly efficient at 4733.91 GB/sec. However, uncached memory read and write speeds drop to average levels of 123.55 GB/sec and 63.07 GB/sec, respectively.

While the instance excels at database operations, software compilation, and small-scale LLM inference, it exhibits clear limitations for larger AI workloads. Text generation using a large 70B parameter model is poor, yielding only 2.4 tokens per second due to the lack of GPU acceleration. Given its high memory density and strong multi-threaded CPU capabilities, this server is best suited for memory-intensive enterprise databases, Redis deployments, and large-scale data processing pipelines.
description: Google Cloud Platform n2d-highmem-80 is a memory-optimized instance featuring 80 dedicated vCPUs and 640 GB of RAM, powered by an AMD EPYC 7B13 processor. Built on the x86_64 architecture, it provides a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8 GB per core, though it lacks local storage and GPU accelerators. Performance benchmarks show strong multi-core capabilities and top-tier cryptographic execution, supported by hardware-accelerated AES and SHA instructions. While cached memory bandwidth is highly efficient, uncached memory throughput and single-core performance remain average. Additionally, text generation on large 70B parameter LLMs is poor due to the absence of dedicated accelerators. This instance is highly suited for memory-intensive workloads, including large-scale database operations, Redis caching layers, and complex software compilation.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform n2d-highmem-80 is a memory-optimized server with 80 vCPUs and 640 GB RAM, powered by AMD EPYC 7B13 CPUs, designed for memory-intensive databases and multi-threaded workloads.
meta_description: Google Cloud Platform n2d-highmem-80 is an AMD EPYC-powered instance with 80 vCPUs and 640 GB RAM, optimized for memory-heavy database workloads.
tagline: A high-density memory instance featuring eighty dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs and six hundred forty gigabytes of RAM for demanding database workloads.

640 GB of system memory providing 8 GB per vCPU
